task: Can you help me make a simple checklist for getting ready for school tomorrow? I want it to be easy to follow tonight so I don’t forget anything in the morning.

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — here’s a simple, easy-to-follow checklist for tonight and tomorrow morning:

## Tonight
- [ ] Pack backpack
- [ ] Put homework/assignments in backpack
- [ ] Charge laptop/tablet/phone if needed
- [ ] Lay out clothes for tomorrow
- [ ] Pack lunch/snack if you need one
- [ ] Fill water bottle
- [ ] Set alarm
- [ ] Put shoes, keys, and anything else you need by the door
- [ ] Check your schedule for tomorrow
- [ ] Go to bed on time

## Tomorrow morning
- [ ] Wake up when alarm goes off
- [ ] Get dressed
- [ ] Brush teeth / wash face
- [ ] Eat breakfast
- [ ] Grab backpack, lunch, and water bottle
- [ ] Check that you have homework and school supplies
- [ ] Leave on time

If you want, I can also make this into a super short version you can copy into your notes app.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Simple enough. I can use that tonight.
